name: sylvester-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Sylvester Francis.

plugins.name: go-toolkit
plugins.description: Go developer-productivity skills: scaffolding, debugging, testing, refactoring/review, performance, security, observability, and tiered model orchestration.

plugins.name: typescript-toolkit
plugins.description: TypeScript developer-productivity skills: scaffolding, debugging, testing, refactoring/type-safety, performance, security, observability, and tiered model orchestration.

plugins.name: python-toolkit
plugins.description: Python developer-productivity skills: scaffolding (uv/ruff/mypy/pytest), debugging, testing, refactoring/type-safety, performance profiling, and tiered model orchestration.

plugins.name: model-orchestration
plugins.description: Language-agnostic tiered model orchestration for substantial tasks: plan with Opus (max effort), execute with Sonnet, and cross-verify with Haiku or Sonnet via an independent, adversarial pass.
